title: High-Risk Drug Monitoring Audit
instruction: Audit this 69-year-old male cardiac patient's records for MONITORING FAILURES and DECLINING TRENDS. He is on amiodarone â€” a high-risk drug requiring regular thyroid, liver, and pulmonary monitoring. Check: (1) whether required monitoring was performed on schedule, (2) whether slowly rising lab values triggered appropriate action, (3) whether declining kidney function was addressed with renal-protective measures. You need to find 3 separate issues.
